theme_and_archetype.emotional_tone: Premium, minimal, authoritative, clear, no-fluff operator.
theme_and_archetype.vibe: McKinsey clarity combined with a modern tech-operator edge. Deep black backgrounds, crisp typography, and high-energy amber/orange accents for focus and action.

color_palette.strategy: Swiss Brutalist with a tactical edge. Rely heavily on monochrome structure, using the accent color strictly for interactions, CTAs, and guiding the user's eye.

typography.pairing_strategy: The Swiss Brutalist (Tech / Art) - Radical weight contrast, using highly structural and modern fonts.

heading_font.usage: H1, H2, H3, bold metric counters. Tracking tight to tighter.

body_font.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, navigation. Highly legible operator feel.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-black
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing + Bento Grids. High use of negative space.
layout_and_spacing.padding_scale: p-6, p-8, p-12, py-24, py-32 for sections

grid_system.marketing: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetric, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, wide gaps (gap-8). Elements span multiple columns.
grid_system.dashboard: Mode B: The Control Room Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4). Dense data layout.

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for paragraphs and dense content. Center-alignment only for specific high-impact hero headings or isolated CTAs.

surface_strategies.navigation: The 'Crystal' Variant (Glassmorphism). backdrop-blur-xl with a 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/10 dark, border-black/5 light).
surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders ('Technical' Look) - Expose the skeleton. Flat background, border-collapse style, 1px subtle border on right/bottom, no soft drop shadows.
surface_strategies.cta_sections: The 'Tracing Beam' - Glowing gradient lines along the container edge to signal 'Active/Alive' execution technology.
surface_strategies.corners: Minimal rounding (rounded-none or rounded-sm max). The brand is sharp, operator-focused, and uncompromising.

rules: Must have a visible navigation bar on desktop.
Include Logo/Name, 3-5 core links (About, Services, Case Studies, Blog), Theme Toggle, and a primary CTA (Book Call).
Header must be sticky/fixed with z-50 and use the Crystal Glassmorphism surface strategy.
Do NOT use a hamburger menu on desktop viewports.
Hover states for ALL interactive elements, utilizing color shifts or subtle translations.
Smooth entrance animations for sections using framer-motion (e.g., staggered fade-ins for the Bento grid).
Stat counters must animate from 0 to target number on scroll into view.
Interactive data points in Case Studies / Admin must have clear, high-contrast hover states.

component_strategies.ui_library: Use Shadcn/UI heavily but override the default 'Vercel' look to match the sharp, minimal operator brand.
component_strategies.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight for marketing, Regular for admin).
component_strategies.forms: Use Shadcn Input/Form/Select. High contrast borders, clear focus states (ring-accent_primary).
component_strategies.tabs_and_accordions: Use Shadcn components for FAQ and Service detail toggling. Remove standard background colors, use typography weight and bottom-borders for active states.

pages_and_sections.hero: Extreme impact. Aamir Mir's authority statement front and center. Dual CTA (Book Call in Accent, Request Audit in Outline). Background should be the generated dark/light abstract texture.
pages_and_sections.about: A stark, editorial layout. High-contrast portrait on one side, bold operator philosophy on the other.
pages_and_sections.services: Grid of 5 core services. Each service card explicitly broken down into: [Problem] -> [System] -> [Outcome]. Expose the structural grid.
pages_and_sections.systems_thinking: A high-end visual showcase section utilizing the 3D abstract visualization image. Parallax scroll effect. Text highlights proprietary frameworks.
pages_and_sections.case_studies: Data-heavy but beautiful. Large typography for stat counters (e.g., '+240% ROI'). Scrolling client logos in a continuous marquee (black and white logos only).
pages_and_sections.blog: Editorial grid. Categories clearly marked with tags. Hovering on a card slightly dims others or sharply outlines the active card.
pages_and_sections.cta_flow: Immersive, full-screen takeover or large embedded form for booking/audits. Frictionless.
pages_and_sections.admin_panel: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast). Dense, functional, cardless tables. Focus on data density for managing blog posts and leads.

hero_dark_bg.description: Minimalist dark slate background with a glowing amber geometric line. Use with bg-cover and bg-center.

hero_light_bg.description: Minimalist off-white background with orange and charcoal architectural struts.

systems_thinking_visual.description: Premium abstract 3D visualization of interconnected nodes (black and amber).

aamir_portrait.description: Executive portrait representing Aamir Mir. Apply a grayscale filter via CSS to match the brand.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Add the font imports (Cabinet Grotesk and Satoshi) to the global CSS and extend the Tailwind config font-family.
Implement both Light and Dark modes using next-themes or equivalent. Default to Dark mode.
Do NOT use standard card styles (no soft shadows, no large border radii). Keep surfaces sharp, flat, and use 1px technical borders.
The primary color MUST be mapped to the amber/orange hex codes defined. Use it sparingly for massive visual impact (CTAs, key highlights, stat counters).
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react, framer-motion, and react-fast-marquee for the client logo scroller.
ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) must include a data-testid attribute.
Build the 5 Services as a Bento grid layout, strict HTML/Tailwind styling for the structure. Each box must distinctly show Problem -> System -> Outcome.
The admin panel must be built using Shadcn UI components but heavily styled to match the minimal operator aesthetic (no padding fluff, high data density).
For the hero background, apply a subtle parallax effect or slow-moving framer-motion scaling to the provided image URLs.
Ensure the CTA flow (Book call / Audit) is highly visible across the site, anchoring trust and driving conversions.
